name: ticker
description: Smoothly animates between numeric values with a custom formatter.

props.name: value
props.description: Target numeric value — the component smoothly animates to this.

props.name: duration
props.description: Animation duration in milliseconds. Defaults to motion.duration.slow.

props.name: formatter
props.description: Formats the interpolated value to a display string. Defaults to Math.round.

props.name: variant
props.description: Typography variant used to render the animated number.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional text style applied to the rendered value.

props.name: color
props.description: Color token applied to the text.
